productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Boys Khaki Shorts
description: Composition Khaki shorts made of 100% cotton, has a button and zipper closure on the front, two side pockets, two buttoned cargo pockets at the thighs, two back pockets, stitch detailing, and belt loops on the waist Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash inside out with like colours in cool water at 30 C using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Hang dry in shade Dry clean delicate Warm iron; do not iron on decorations boys will love these cargo shorts from united colors of benetton. Great to wear when on a family road-trip, for a casual outing, or when hanging out with buddies. Pair it with flip flops, sneakers or floaters for a cool look.
